package.name: aion-forge
package.author: AionCore Team
package.description: Universal AI Agent Capability Router — 29+ built-in skills for code generation, text processing, web search, memory management, and multi-agent collaboration
package.description_zh: AI 万能技能路由器 — 29+ 内置能力：代码生成、文本处理、网页搜索、记忆管理、多 Agent 协作

security.safety_rating_reason: Open source, built-in dual-layer security review (heuristic + AI), audit logging, configurable fail-closed policy, SSRF protection, secret leak detection
security.safety_rating_reason_zh: 开源项目，内置双层安全审查（启发式 + AI），审计日志，可配置 fail-closed 策略，SSRF 防护，密钥泄露检测

network_access.reason: Calls configured LLM backend (Ollama/OpenAI/Google AI) for AI inference, SerpAPI for web search
network_access.reason_zh: 调用已配置的 AI 模型后端（Ollama/OpenAI/Google AI）进行推理，调用 SerpAPI 进行网页搜索

inbound_listen.reason: aion-server HTTP REST API for cross-agent integration
inbound_listen.reason_zh: aion-server HTTP REST API，用于跨 Agent 集成

filesystem_read.reason: Read workspace files for parsing (YAML/JSON/CSV/code), skill definitions, and memory store
filesystem_read.reason_zh: 读取工作区文件用于解析（YAML/JSON/CSV/代码）、技能定义和记忆存储
filesystem_read.scope: Workspace directory and ~/.aion/ config directory only

filesystem_write.reason: Persist memory store, audit logs, generated skill definitions, and execution logs
filesystem_write.reason_zh: 持久化记忆存储、审计日志、生成的技能定义和执行日志

process_exec.reason: Disabled by default. Only used if user explicitly enables process_exec permission in skill definitions
process_exec.reason_zh: 默认禁用。仅在用户明确启用 process_exec 权限时使用

variables.name: AI_SECURITY_FAIL_POLICY
variables.purpose: Security policy when AI review unavailable

data_types: Execution audit logs (skill name, verdict, timestamp)
external_recipients: User-configured LLM API endpoint — task content sent for AI inference
SerpAPI — search queries only (when web_search capability is used)
data_handling.data_retention: Local files persist until user deletes them

checks: Block private network URLs (SSRF protection, including IPv6)
Block sensitive field names in parameters (api_key, password, etc.)
AI semantic review of task intent
Detect API key patterns in output (sk-, AKIA, ghp_, glpat-)
AI semantic scan for credential/infrastructure exposure

runtime_security.fail_policy: Configurable: 'closed' (default, deny on error) or 'open' (allow on error)

aion-cli.description: Command-line interface for direct skill execution

aion-server.description: HTTP REST API server for cross-agent integration

pre_install: Verify SHA256 checksum of downloaded binary matches this manifest
Review and confirm network + filesystem permissions listed above
Check no conflicting service on port 3000 (or configure AION_PORT)
post_install: Run 'aion-server' then curl http://localhost:3000/v1/health — should return {"status": "ok"}
